<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" role="img" aria-label="bitter">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="cupGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#f3f3f3"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#bdbdbd"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="coffeeGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#5a3a2e"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#1f120f"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="softShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="6" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity="0.25"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="steamBlur" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.2"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/>

  <!-- Ground shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="436" rx="120" ry="24" fill="#000" opacity="0.08"/>

  <!-- Jagged "bitter" spikes above cup -->
  <g transform="translate(256 142)" opacity="0.95">
    <path d="M-120 0 L-90 -22 L-70 0 L-45 -22 L-25 0 L0 -22 L25 0 L50 -22 L70 0 L95 -22 L125 0 L95 18 L70 0 L50 18 L25 0 L0 18 L-25 0 L-50 18 L-70 0 L-90 18 Z" fill="#7a3b1c" opacity="0.15"/>
    <path d="M-120 -12 L-92 -32 L-72 -10 L-46 -32 L-26 -10 L0 -32 L26 -10 L52 -32 L72 -10 L98 -32 L125 -12" fill="none" stroke="#7a3b1c" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M-118 14 L-92 2 L-70 24 L-45 2 L-24 24 L0 2 L24 24 L48 2 L70 24 L95 2 L123 14" fill="none" stroke="#6b2f14" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Steam -->
  <g filter="url(#steamBlur)" stroke="#cfcfcf" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.95">
    <path d="M204 108 C190 86 210 72 196 52" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M236 96 C222 74 242 60 228 40" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M268 102 C254 80 274 66 260 46" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M300 112 C286 90 306 76 292 56" fill="none"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Cup body -->
  <g filter="url(#softShadow)">
    <!-- Cup outer -->
    <path d="M170 190
             C170 170 186 154 206 154
             H306
             C326 154 342 170 342 190
             V372
             C342 404 320 426 288 426
             H224
             C192 426 170 404 170 372
             Z" fill="url(#cupGrad)" stroke="#8a8a8a" stroke-width="4"/>

    <!-- Inner rim -->
    <path d="M188 194
             C188 182 198 172 210 172
             H302
             C314 172 324 182 324 194
             V206
             C324 220 314 230 300 230
             H212
             C198 230 188 220 188 206
             Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.95" stroke="#7f7f7f" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- Liquid surface -->
    <path d="M196 234 C216 260 250 260 256 260 C262 260 296 260 316 234
             C316 234 318 238 318 246
             V324
             C318 340 306 352 290 352
             H222
             C206 352 194 340 194 324
             V246
             C194 238 196 234 196 234 Z" fill="url(#coffeeGrad)"/>

    <!-- Liquid shine -->
    <path d="M224 248 C210 285 220 330 238 352" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="10" opacity="0.12" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- Cup highlight edge -->
    <path d="M198 244 V360" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.35" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Handle -->
  <g>
    <path d="M342 230
             C386 236 404 266 402 306
             C400 346 377 372 342 374" fill="none" stroke="#8a8a8a" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M350 240
             C386 245 396 270 395 304
             C394 338 377 361 350 363" fill="none" stroke="#cfcfcf" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Small bitter swirls/marks (no text) -->
  <g opacity="0.85" fill="none" stroke="#4a2a1f" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round">
    <path d="M244 364 C232 350 232 336 244 322"/>
    <path d="M268 364 C256 350 256 336 268 322"/>
    <path d="M292 364 C280 350 280 336 292 322"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Slight frown-like face in the foam (abstract, not text) -->
  <g transform="translate(256 305)" opacity="0.35" fill="none" stroke="#2b0f0a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <path d="M-40 -10 C-20 -30 -5 -30 5 -10"/>
    <path d="M40 -10 C20 -30 5 -30 -5 -10"/>
    <path d="M-28 18 C-10 34 10 34 28 18"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Creating bitter SVG**

I need to design an SVG that visually represents "bitter" without any text. I'm thinking about using a steaming cup of coffee or tea, maybe with some droplet signs or a sad face. But a better choice might be to showcase a dark liquid with jagged, spiky shapes indicating bitterness. I'll set the canvas to 512 and position the cup at the bottom center, adding zigzag icons above to convey that bitter feeling. Finally, I'll return the SVG as a JSON string.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
